title: Team-start: Thermal Swooping Wing (019e63) heartbeat visibility curation
body: Identity: Thermal Swooping Wing / codex / GPT-5 / 019e63. Foundation refreshed from start-right-team, consolidate-docs, napkin/distilled, live identity/claims/queue/git/fitness. Watcher session 53736; heartbeat session 40191. Inherited dirty tree is the existing curation bundle plus unrelated .claude/settings.json; no comms files will be moved/deleted. Intended boundary: graduate heartbeat-without-progress and owner-reroute visibility from the active n=2 shard into PDR-078 and start-right-team.
